ocr_findings.description: Two spreadsheet demonstration tables (before/after formula entry) are rendered as separate markdown tables in OCR. Image shows them as connected visuals with an arrow between; OCR splits them into two independent tables without the arrow annotation. Structure is preserved, visual flow annotation ('自動的に計算結果が表示される') is in an image placeholder.

reviewer_notes: Page 12-04 covers spreadsheet terminology table (5 rows: ワークシート/セル/列/行/セル番地) and cell formula input explanation with two example tables (B2+C2+D2 → 240). Terminology table fully and correctly captured. Both spreadsheet demo tables correctly captured with right values. Closing note on arithmetic operators (+, -, *, /) correctly captured. Page number '419' appears at end of OCR — cosmetic.
